Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: Our Big Block Chevy gets ready for life inside a high-revving hot rod.
Video.title: Hot Rod Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: We start a new project, taking a 1972 Camaro Split Bumper and turning into a powerhouse race car.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1972 Camaro gets outfitted with a custom roll cage to help strengthen the chassis.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: The Carcass shop starts the suspension work on our ’72 road course Camaro.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install
Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install
Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: It's a blast from the past when project Fast Lane finally sings.
Video.title: The Ice Horse

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
